Cleaning the library 

```{r}
setwd('filepath')
VectorScan <- read_xlsx("VectorScan_Library_1_2.xlsx")
```

```{r}
VectorScan_GSLinkerNoise <- VectorScan[grep("GSGGGSGGGSG", VectorScan$'AA Sequence'), ]
VectorScan_cleaned <- anti_join(VectorScan, VectorScan_GSLinkerNoise, by = 'id')

nrow(VectorScan)
nrow(VectorScan_cleaned)
```

```{r}
setwd('filepath')
write_xlsx(VectorScan_cleaned, 'VectorScan_cleaned.xlsx')
```

```{r}
View(table(VectorScan$Group))
View(table(VectorScan$Family))
View(table(VectorScan$Species))

View(table(VectorScan_cleaned$Group))
View(table(VectorScan_cleaned$Family))
View(table(VectorScan_cleaned$Species))
```
